fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the specific chart.

fields.name: Analysis Area
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the analysis report chart shows values for sales, purchase, or inventory.

fields.name: Analysis Report Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the analysis report that is used to generate the specific chart that is shown in, for example, the Sales Performance window.

fields.name: Analysis Line Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the analysis line template that is used to generate the specific chart that is shown in, for example, the Sales Performance window.

fields.name: Analysis Column Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the analysis column template that is used to generate the chart that is shown in, for example, the Sales Performance window.

fields.name: Base X-Axis on
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the values from the selected analysis report are displayed in the specific chart.

fields.name: Start Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first date on which analysis report values are included in the chart.

fields.name: End Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last date on which analysis report values are included in the chart.

fields.name: Period Length
fields.tooltip: Specifies the length of periods in the chart.

fields.name: No. of Periods
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many periods are shown in the chart.

fields.name: Last Viewed
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.
